name: Template for remote dev with LazyVim and SSHD
description: An Ubuntu-based devcontainer pre-configured with LazyVim, SSH, Git, and common utilities.

sshPublicKey.description: The SSH public key to add to authorized_keys (defaults to local SSH_PUBLIC_KEY env var if left blank).

lazyVimConfigRepo.description: The Git repository URL for your LazyVim configuration.
